customManagers.description: Track the Home Assistant base images (tag + digest) in alloy/build.yaml

packageRules.description: Grafana Alloy binary, copied from the digest-pinned grafana/alloy image in alloy/Dockerfile (handled by the native docker manager). After merging, bump version: in alloy/config.yaml to surface the Update button in Home Assistant — see alloy/DOCS.md.
Group the two per-arch HA base images into one PR — they bump together
